results.title: Language Learning Revenue and Usage Statistics (2026) - Business of Apps
results.highlight: - Language learning apps generated $1.54 billion in 2025, a 18.8% year-on-year increase - Duolingo made the most revenue of all apps, reporting $1.03 billion in 2025 - Duolingo also had the most usage in 2025 by a large margin - Language learning apps were downloaded 327 million times in 2025 [...] Revenue in the language learning app sector reached $1.5 billion in 2025. results.title: HelloTalk
results.author: Exa
results.highlight: HelloTalk, also abbreviated as HT, is a language exchange app and website released in 2013. It is monetized using the freemium model. It was created by Chinese developer Zackery Ngai. As of December 2025, the platform supports learning and communication in more than 260 languages, including English, Japanese, Spanish, French, Chinese, Korean, and German.
